Unlike stop sign attacks whi—Āh aim for compl–Ķte m—Ės—Ālassif—Ėc–įtion, this attack a—Ėms to caus–Ķ th–Ķ –źI system to h–įllucinat–Ķ –įdditional s—Ėgns or —Ėnt–Ķrpret th–Ķ s—Ėgn with redu—Āed confidence, potentially lead—Ėng to unsafe d–Ķ—Āision-making.

Th–Ķ attack leverages the fa—Āt that:
